mode: Implémentation. Commits atomiques. Reprise par phase.

decisions.next_changeset: 088 (086 is a gap, 087 = reserve-livraison-responsable; single file 088-visite.yaml with both tables)
decisions.roles: ADMIN, MANAGER, AGENT, PORTAL, SUPER_ADMIN. @PreAuthorize style: hasAnyRole('ADMIN','MANAGER','AGENT') — NO ROLE_ prefix. JWT authorities have ROLE_ prefix.
decisions.email_sender: interface com.yem.hlm.backend.outbox.service.provider.EmailSender.send(to, subject, body). Brevo default impl (BrevoHttpEmailSender). Inject the interface.
decisions.scheduler_pattern: @Component + @ConditionalOnProperty(value='spring.task.scheduling.enabled', matchIfMissing=true) + @Scheduled(fixedDelay) + societeContextHelper.runAsSystem(() -> service.scan()). PERSISTENT DB scan — NOT taskScheduler in-memory.
decisions.tenant_context: Inject SocieteContextHelper; requireSocieteId() + requireUserId(). Static SocieteContext.getRole()/isSuperAdmin(). RLS via current_setting('app.current_societe_id') GUC + nil-uuid 00000000-... bypass.
decisions.vente_reuse: com.yem.hlm.backend.vente.service.VenteService.create(CreateVenteRequest). Fields: reservationId, contactId, propertyId, agentId, prixVente, reduction, dateCompromis, dateLivraisonPrevue, expectedClosingDate, notes. DO NOT reimplement pipeline.
decisions.user_entity: com.yem.hlm.backend.user.domain.User — table app_user — email field (NOT NULL, 160).
decisions.jpa_conventions: @Entity @Table(name,indexes) ; @Id @GeneratedValue(strategy=GenerationType.UUID) ; @Version Long version ; societeId UUID @Column(name=societe_id, nullable=false) ; Instant for TIMESTAMPTZ ; @ManyToOne(fetch=LAZY)+@JoinColumn for FK ; lombok @Getter @NoArgsConstructor(access=PROTECTED).
decisions.liquibase_format: YAML createTable + FK constraints.foreignKeyName/references + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + CREATE POLICY <table>_societe_isolation USING (societe_id = NULLIF(current_setting('app.current_societe_id', TRUE),'')::uuid OR societe_id = '00000000-...'::uuid). Register in db.changelog-master.yaml.
decisions.frontend: Guard core/auth/auth.guard.ts (authGuard). Vente components features/ventes/ (vente-create, advance-pipeline-dialog, pipeline-stepper). Contact detail features/contacts/contact-detail.component.ts. Angular 19 standalone @if/@for, signals.
decisions.timezone: Store Instant (TIMESTAMPTZ). Display/saisie/ICS/reminders in Africa/Casablanca (UTC+1, no DST). Reminder dueAt = dateHeure.minus(24h)/minus(1h) — pure Instant math; Casablanca for rendering only.
